response.justification: Highly experienced senior/staff engineer with strong fullstack credentials including TypeScript, Node.js, React, and relational databases — easily meets the technical bar. However, the role is explicitly entry/junior-level with high on-site presence required, while the candidate is based in San Francisco and has 15+ years of senior experience. Severe overqualification creates retention risk, likely salary mismatch, and the location/on-site requirement is a hard blocker.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React fullstack experience
Solid software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture)
Exposure to AI/LLM tooling and AWS/Kubernetes infrastructure
concerns: Severely overqualified for a junior/mid-level entry position
Based in San Francisco — incompatible with high on-site presence requirement
Relational/PostgreSQL experience is thin; primary DB exposure is MongoDB
